description: Black and green, two-tone leather upper with strategically placed overlays Four-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyelets Padded tongue, embossed branding on the lateral side Pull loop at the heel and tongue for ease of wear Padded insole for in-step comfort Rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heel Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard
